# CTLA4 patient distribution (HNSC Atlas)

**Note:** This chunk calls `helpers$add_malignant_gene_group`, which is not defined in the preprocessing-checks setup. Source `PROJECT_SCRIPTS/utils/Utils.R` (or your cluster `helpers` object) before knitting this section, or skip it.

```{r ctla4-atlas-sanity, eval=FALSE}
merged.results <- helpers$add_malignant_gene_group(
  seurat_obj = HNSC.Atlas,
  gene = "CTLA4",
  cell_type_col = "Cell_Type",
  assay = "RNA"
)

merged.results.ps <- merged.results$patient_summary
counts_table <- table(merged.results.ps$CTLA4_EXP, merged.results.ps$Project)
print(counts_table)
```
